scope.summary: Adds a parsed-YAML guard test proving release.yml outward-facing publishing jobs remain unreachable from non-tag release rehearsal events.
out_of_scope: No actionlint installation or auxiliary workflow behavior changes.

entry_points.name: release_publishing_jobs_stay_tag_gated_on_actual_workflow_conditions
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp --test release_publish_guards -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 2/2 passed. This test parses .github/workflows/release.yml as YAML, validates tag push plus workflow_dispatch triggers, requires direct positive startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') guards on release/publish-crates/docker/publish-mcp-registry, verifies verify-mcp-registry is skipped through publish-mcp-registry, and confirms docker.yml/publish-mcp.yml remain workflow_dispatch-only recovery workflows.

entry_points.name: release_publish_guard_mutation_selftest_catches_removed_job_guards
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp --test release_publish_guards -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 2/2 passed. The mutation self-test mutates the parsed workflow in memory by replacing each direct publishing job guard with always() and by rewiring verify-mcp-registry away from publish-mcp-registry; each mutation must produce a checker error naming the affected job.

entry_points.name: scoped clippy
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo clippy -p oraclemcp --test release_publish_guards -- -D warnings` exited 0.

entry_points.name: source whitespace and staged discipline
entry_points.trace: `git diff --check -- Cargo.lock crates/oraclemcp/Cargo.toml crates/oraclemcp/tests/release_publish_guards.rs` exited 0. `scripts/swarm_discipline.sh struct-atomicity --staged && scripts/swarm_discipline.sh stale-delete-check --staged` exited 0 before the source commit.

limitations: cargo fmt -p oraclemcp -- --check was not used as close evidence because the shared checkout has an unrelated dirty crates/oraclemcp/src/main.rs formatting diff outside this bead; the new guard file was checked directly with rustfmt.
